message:
fix(connectors): clippy lint cleanups and field rename alignment in tests

Slack connector:
- Replace intermediate variable with chained iterator (clippy
  needless_collect) in introspection nonexistent-op test
- Use SlackConnector::default() instead of Default::default() for
  explicit type construction (clippy default_trait_access)

Twilio connector:
- Same Default::default() → TwilioConnector::default() cleanup

VectorDB integration tests:
- Rename .risk → .risk_level in compliance assertions to match the
  upstream field rename in fcp-core's operation metadata struct

Also updates beads issue tracker with current status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
